text: High demand and low demand.
Both spell bad news for service companies.
We turn volatility into stability.
I'm Melissa Tokmak, founder and CEO of NETIC.
America's economy runs on essential services.
HVAC, plumbing, electric, roofing, a 500 billion plus backbone,
powering every home and business.
But behind the scenes, it's tough.
Last summer, a Midwest HVAC company lost $3 million
when 500 calls went uninsured after a storm.
Weeks later, low demand cost them another $2 million,
and their top technician.
Stories like this aren't rare.
They're routine.
Service industries face volatile demand,
complex operations, and severe labor shortages.
Yet, they remain stuck on outdated systems overlooked by advanced AI.
They deserve better.
So we built NETIC.
NETIC is the AI revenue engine built for service industries.
With two core products, Convert and Cultivate,
we maximize revenue during busy times and create demand when business slows.
Convert autonomously captures and books every inbound lead across all channels.
Calls, texts, online widgets, and third-party integrations 24-7.
So you never miss revenue, even during peak demand.
Bonus, it adapts seamlessly to your unique workflows,
easily handles complex bookings,
and intelligently escalates with context when necessary.
Cultivate proactively analyzes internal signals from Convert
and external data to autonomously launch targeted campaigns,
handling outreach, customer conversations, and bookings entirely on its own,
turning slow periods into fully booked schedules.
Every interaction, insight, and booking is captured in analytics,
so you get a clear view of what's working and where to grow next.
Busy or slow?
NETIC keeps your revenue flowing.
NETIC is your autonomous revenue engine.
We have handled millions of customer interactions,
generated thousands of leads, and booked over 50,000 jobs,
completely autonomously.
Companies love it, and their customers do too.
But don't just take our word for it, hear it for yourself.
You're really good AI assistant.
I've never really felt realistic before.
Your AI answering machine is quite impressive.
What do you all use for that?
NETIC already powers the world's leading home services companies,
including Heartland Home Services, Hoffman Brothers, Fox, Pascal,
and a landmark strategic partnership with Next Star Network across North America.
We're proud to announce $20 million in funding from the best investors of our generation,
Founders Fund, Greylock, and the visionary founders behind Figma, Scale, and more
to help us scale and meet growing demand.
Our mission is to bring Frontier AI to the industries that keep America running,
solving their toughest operational challenges,
and delivering measurable, unstoppable growth.
Whether to unlock untapped revenue or build the future with us,
visit netic.ai.
NetIC, the AI revenue engine for essential services.
